items.title: Buffalo Springfield just came on Pandora, which never fails to remind me of Stephen Stills getting an honorary doctorate the same ceremony I got my real one. And that if he has any memory of me, it's me getting lost on stage trying to exit after getting said degree in front of 6,
items.author: Dr. Justin Quinn
items.body_excerpt: Buffalo Springfield just came on Pandora, which never fails to remind me of Stephen Stills getting an honorary doctorate the same ceremony I got my real one. And that if he has any memory of me, it's me getting lost on stage trying to exit after getting said degree in front of 6,000 people.
